title: listera cordata subsp. japonica
intro: Listera cordata subsp. japonica, also known as Japanese twayblade, is a type of terrestrial orchid that belongs to the Listera genus. It is native to Japan and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Listera cordata subsp. japonica are attributed to its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, it is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to alleviate various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
